action.reasoning: Observation: Best eval score 0.5777, success_rate=87.3%, but successful episodes average ~453m travel distance. Local test shows 100% success with shorter distances. Analysis: The score formula S_i*(300/d_i) means I need BOTH high success AND short distances. The successful episodes are traveling ~453m which is very long. Key improvement: use utility/distance ratio to pick neighbors (maximize utility per meter), and use a smarter global navigation strategy. Also need to improve success rate from 87.3% to 95%+. Decision: Rewrite planner to: 1) Score neighbors by utility/distance ratio (not just utility), 2) When navigating to distant nodes, pick the one with best utility/path_length ratio, 3) Add a 'sweep' strategy for last-mile exploration using frontier cells from global_map.
